endpoints.name: Webhook to notify the completion of the eSigning packaging process.

parameters.name: AccountId
parameters.description: The account ID which the event is sent in the context of

parameters.name: EventData
parameters.description: The date related to the event.

children.name: ExternalId
children.description: This id refers to the tracking id provided during the creation of the signing session, which is used for internal correlation purposes.

children.name: Id
children.description: The signing sessions id related to signing session.

parameters.name: EventName
parameters.description: The name of the received event. The value for this event should be :- "package.completed".

parameters.name: ExpiresAt
parameters.description: The timestamp when the event expires.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: Represents the unique identifier for the packaging complete event.

parameters.name: IsMockEvent
parameters.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the event is a mock event. Helpful for testing purposes.

parameters.name: Sender
parameters.description: The service at the vendor's side that is sending the notification.

parameters.name: Tags
parameters.description: Optional tags that can be included in the event.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp indicating when the packaging complete event was created.

parameters.name: IsMockEvent
